roles.content: Postmodernism: A comprehensive examination of postmodernism within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: Journal of the History of Philosophy

roles.content: Critical perspectives on postmodernism: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to postmodernism.
Recent developments in postmodernism: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of postmodernism in contemporary philosophy.
